scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w api-gateway" "npm run dev -w auth-service" "npm run dev -w compiler-service" "npm run dev -w mcq-service" "npm run dev -w interview-service" "npm run dev -w ats-service" "npm run dev -w contest-service" "npm run dev -w admin-service" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start -w api-gateway" "npm start -w auth-service" "npm start -w compiler-service" "npm start -w mcq-service" "npm start -w interview-service" "npm start -w ats-service" "npm start -w contest-service" "npm start -w admin-service" "npm start -w client"
